name: Chicken Regency Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook artichoke according to package directions; drain.
2. Combine with salad dressing, chicken, water chestnuts, olives, and soy sauce. Cover and refrigerate at least 3 hours.
3. Melt butter; add pecans and cook over low heat, stirring constantly until nuts begin to brown. Drain nuts and sprinkle with vegetable seasoning; cool.
4. Drain any liquid from chicken mixture. Add celery just before serving.
5. Serve on lettuce leaves and garnish with pecans.
